Configuration:
  codeinfra:codeinfra:Stack: (same)
    [urn=urn:codeinfra:dev::codeinfra-stack-output-diff::codeinfra:codeinfra:Stack::codeinfra-stack-output-diff-dev]
    --outputs:--
    vehicles: {
        taxi: {
            color: "yellow"
            size : "big"
            urn  : "urn:codeinfra:dev::codeinfra-stack-output-diff::some:demo:Taxi::taxi"
        }
        urn : "urn:codeinfra:dev::codeinfra-stack-output-diff::some:demo:Vehicles::vehicles"
    }
      some:demo:Taxi: (same)
        [urn=urn:codeinfra:dev::codeinfra-stack-output-diff::some:demo:Taxi::taxi]
      some:demo:Vehicles: (same)
        [urn=urn:codeinfra:dev::codeinfra-stack-output-diff::some:demo:Vehicles::vehicles]
